name: s61_add_validation
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py and tell me what it does.
Add email format validation to create_user — reject emails without @ symbol. Output the full updated file.
Also add password strength validation — minimum 8 characters. Output the full updated file.
Add rate limiting to the authenticate method — max 5 attempts per email per minute. Output the full updated file.

name: s62_add_logging
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Add structured logging to every public method — log method name, args, and duration. Output the full updated file.
Add error logging with stack traces to all exception handlers. Output the full updated file.
Add audit logging — log who made changes (add an actor_id parameter to update_user and delete_user). Output the full updated file.

name: s63_add_pagination
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Change list_users to support cursor-based pagination instead of offset-based. Output the full updated file.
Add sorting support to list_users — sort by name, email, created_at, or updated_at. Output the full updated file.
Add filtering by date range (created_after, created_before) to list_users. Output the full updated file.

name: s64_add_batch_ops
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Add a bulk_create_users method that creates multiple users in a single transaction. Output the full updated file.
Add a bulk_deactivate method that deactivates a list of user IDs. Output the full updated file.
Add an export_users method that returns all users as a CSV string. Output the full updated file.

name: s65_refactor_cache
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Refactor the cache to use a proper LRU cache with max size of 1000 entries. Output the full updated file.
Add cache hit/miss metrics tracking. Output the full updated file.
Add a cache_warm method that pre-loads the most recently active users into cache. Output the full updated file.

name: s66_add_permissions
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Add a permission system — each role has a set of permissions (read, write, delete, admin). Add a check_permission method. Output the full updated file.
Add a require_permission decorator that can be applied to methods. Output the full updated file.
Make delete_user require admin permission and update_user require write permission. Output the full updated file.

name: s67_add_hooks
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Add pre/post hooks — allow registering callbacks that run before and after create, update, delete operations. Output the full updated file.
Add a hook that automatically sends a welcome email after user creation. Output the full updated file.
Add a hook that notifies admins when a user is deactivated. Output the full updated file.

name: s68_add_soft_delete
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Change delete_user to soft delete — set a deleted_at timestamp instead of removing from DB. Output the full updated file.
Add a restore_user method that reverses a soft delete. Output the full updated file.
Add a purge_deleted method that permanently removes users soft-deleted more than 30 days ago. Output the full updated file.

name: s69_add_sessions
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Add session management — create_session returns a session token after authentication. Output the full updated file.
Add validate_session and revoke_session methods. Output the full updated file.
Add revoke_all_sessions that invalidates all sessions for a user (useful after password change). Output the full updated file.

name: s70_add_api_keys
turns: Read codebase/user_service.py.
Add API key management — generate_api_key creates a key for a user with optional scopes. Output the full updated file.
Add validate_api_key that checks the key and returns the associated user and scopes. Output the full updated file.
Add revoke_api_key and list_api_keys methods. Output the full updated file.
